nodes.label: AI as research assistant for finding authoritative sources
nodes.label_negative: AI providing SEO-optimized but low-quality sources
nodes.grounding_span: I want the primary resource that ranks lower in SEO, but much higher in reliability and veracity

nodes.label: AI memory and continuity across conversations
nodes.label_negative: AI forgetting past instructions due to privacy constraints
nodes.grounding_span: Microsoft doesn't remember things to protect privacy, but that ends up being frustrating sometimes because I need it to remember how to do something from conversation to conversation

nodes.label: AI voice and personality appeal
nodes.label_negative: AI with unappealing voice or personality
nodes.grounding_span: I'd use Gemini more often if it had Google Assistant's voices, so I could keep the 'Pink' voice that sounds like Tom Hanks

nodes.label: AI for math calculations and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I used my favorite AI to do the math to save time

nodes.label: AI in writing: research vs. creation
nodes.label_negative: AI used for actual writing instead of human author
nodes.grounding_span: I'd rather use it for research and do the writing myself

nodes.label: AI photorealistic image generation from personal photos
nodes.label_negative: AI generating cartoonish or unrealistic images
nodes.grounding_span: Instapix is so dead-on that when I trained it with photos of myself as a test, it created new photos that actually look like me

nodes.label: Information reliability and veracity
nodes.grounding_span: I want the primary resource that ranks lower in SEO, but much higher in reliability and veracity

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It was a combination of the time savings and efficiency

nodes.label: Pleasant user experience and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: if I have to hear it talk all day, I want to enjoy it

nodes.label: Human creative control and authorship
nodes.grounding_span: I'd rather use it for research and do the writing myself

nodes.label: Creative expression and innovation
nodes.grounding_span: I write music and would love to be able to enter a piece of music as notation or by playing it or singing, then have it transformed to a recording

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for math efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It was a combination of the time savings and efficiency, providing a much easier method than setting up an Excel spreadsheet

nodes.label: Frustration with AI memory limitations
nodes.grounding_span: Microsoft doesn't remember things to protect privacy, but that ends up being frustrating sometimes

nodes.label: Preference for AI with appealing voice
nodes.grounding_span: I'd use Gemini more often if it had Google Assistant's voices, so I could keep the 'Pink' voice that sounds like Tom Hanks

nodes.label: Respect for client preferences against AI writing
nodes.grounding_span: When a client says they do not want AI used, I respect their choice. I handle everything that relates to writing myself

nodes.label: Excitement about AI photorealistic image generation
nodes.grounding_span: Instapix is so dead-on that when I trained it with photos of myself as a test, it created new photos that actually look like me

nodes.label: Systematic comparative testing of AI tools
nodes.grounding_span: I test each AI out using the same problem to find out which one performs best

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through conversation
nodes.grounding_span: I have to restate or hone the search terms
